title: Bowenia serrulata
taxonomy: Bowenia serrulata is classified within the family Stangeriaceae, which is a small family of plants that also includes the genus Stangeria. This classification is based on its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other plants. The genus Bowenia is a monotypic genus, meaning it contains only one species. The classification of Bowenia serrulata has been subject to some debate among botanists, but the Stangeriaceae family is widely accepted.
